features: 【Durable Material】- Hair ties are made of premium quality plastic material which is no smell, nontoxic and eco-friendly. The smooth surfaces of the coil hair bobbles provide a soft and comfortable hand feeling

【Unique Design】- The unique spiral shapes of the hair ties place uneven pressure around the ponytail to avoid kinks. Traceless hair bands help the hair avoid tugging, pulling, split ends and other damage. They can remove from the wet or dry hair easily

【Comfortable Dimension】- The outer diameter of the phone cord hair band is 4 cm and the inner diameter is 2 cm. The stretch length is approximately 27 cm in longest. The comfortable dimension of spiral hair rings can fix well your thick or thin hair

【Elegant Color & Waterproof】- The plastic ponytail holder bands have 3 different colors which are transparent, light coffee and brown. Waterproof material makes spiral hair bands perfect for swimming and bathing

【Widely Use】- Traceless hair rings suitable for various occasions, such as party, ceremony, office, school, journey, etc. They are perfect for daily make-up with different hair styles curls, straight hair, ponytail
description: Description Features Hair ties offers a hold that does not pull on individual hairs, nor does it pull on the scalp, which has been made possible though its shape. Plastic hair ties can catch your hair well and will not hurt your hair, easy to wear on or take off. The simple and elegant design of plastic hair bands make them as nice gift suitable for all the lady friends. Specifications Color： transparent, light coffee, brown Package Weight: 56 g Package Size: 4 x 4 x 12 cm Product Size： inner diameter : Appr. 2 cm/0.8 inches outer diameter : Appr. 4 cm/1.6 inches Package includes 12 x Spiral Hair Ties
